docTitle: Mitʼ Scroll re Bible · Sirjon khon Mondoli hạbicʼ

share.title: Mitʼ Scroll re Bible
share.text: Mitʼ scroll rege, Bible reakʼ maraṅ kahnile ńelme — ar cedakʼ Jisu hecʼlena.

s.ui.footer: Mitʼ Scroll re Bible · Bible reakʼ katha SBT khon
s.hero.title:
Bible,
mitʼ scroll re
s.hero.sub: Mitʼ scroll rege, Bible reakʼ maraṅ kahnile ńelme — ar cedakʼ Jisu hecʼlena.
s.thread.eyebrow: MITʼ AṚANG OKA GOṬA BIBLE BOHALETʼA
s.thread.h2: Mucạtʼre, Bible do mitʼ eskar kahnige kana
s.thread.note: Isor do bachane emakʼa (niyom), hoṛ do jạsti din tạṅgiyakoa, ar mucạtʼre joto jinis do Jisu rege purạukʼa ar pạuṛaokʼa. Latar reakʼ 13 ṭa dhạp do ona hor lekate cetan meꞌ — joto card re “Aro pạṛhaomeꞌ” ạurma jạhạn re jurutʼ kahni ńam lạgitʼ.
s.gospel.eyebrow: NOA KAHNI “IŃ” LẠGITʼ OKA MANE MENAKʼA
s.gospel.lead: Bible do “bhage hoṛ benaomeꞌ” menakʼ ạn pũthi do baṅa.
s.gospel.sublead: Noa do mitʼ kahni kana je Isor do eken daya hotetege, acʼakʼ teye bańcao bae daṛeakʼ kại hoṛkoe bańcaoketʼkoa. Onakʼ ṭhonokre Jisu Mạsi menakʼtaea.
s.gospel.mirror:
Israel reakʼ banṛ mucạtʼ cokkor do sạrige “iń” reakʼ chobi kana

Murti pujạ→Duk→Rakʼ→Isor bańcaoeda→Aronaꞌ murti pujạ…

Bikʼcạrko khon bandi okol hạbicʼ, Israel do noa cokkor do banṛ mucạtʼe doharetʼa. Bible do noa do nonkateye baṅ ol akada je abo “ona do ceꞌ leka kại hoṛko tahẽkana” mente lanḍha okoabona.

Noa do mitʼ arsi kana. Katha do “Israel onkako kạmikeda” do baṅ bickom “ińhõ ona gege kạmiyetʼkana” (1 Korinthiko 10:11).

Mitʼ murti do eken sạkamte benao akan murti do baṅa. Ona do jãhãn jinis abo Isor khon jạsti dulạṛiyetʼ se bharosạetʼkana — taka, jit, manạu, hoṛko, acʼ hõ. Ar Isor doe acʼ reaṅ sạna purạu reakʼ jọgạṛ leka bebohar do hõ murti pujạge kana.

Mucạtʼre, jạsti jurutʼ murti do “Isor reakʼ siṅghạsonre duṛupʼakan iń acʼge” kana.
s.gospel.coreIntro: Enḍekhan Isor do nonka kại hoṛ celeka bańcaoea? Noage Bible udukʼetʼ susamacar reakʼ ṭhonok kana.
s.gospel.crux:
Goṭa Bible do mitʼ ṭhạure udukʼa.

Hoṛ do acʼakʼ teye kại reakʼ cokkor do bae raputʼ daṛelena, ar okoe hõ dhorom bạnukʼkoa. Onate jãhãe onkoakʼ ṭhạure dại do tol ańjom lạgitʼ tahẽ lạgitʼa.

Jisu do eken bhage sikhạu emaꞌ lạgitʼ baṅe hecʼlena. Iń bańcao reakʼ eṭakʼ hor bạnukʼ iạtee hecʼ lạgitʼa.

Ona kurusre okoe khạblakʼ tahẽ lạgitʼ tahẽkana ona do iń kana.
Jisu do iń reaṅ kạie gakuketʼa ar iń reaṅ ṭhạure ona kurusre toraoyena.

“Aboakʼ kại gunạkʼtege uni doe ghạl ocolena; aboakʼ ghạtko iạtege uni doe talga tạuạkʼ ocoyena … ar uniyakʼ dal ur iạte abo do bon bogeyena.” — Jesaea 53:5
s.faq.q1: ▸ Enḍekhan mitʼ goekiạ eken pạtiạukate sorgeye senokʼa, ar joto jiwi bhage tahẽkan menkhan baeꞌ pạtiạukʼ hoṛ do norokeye senokʼa?
s.faq.a1:
Noa do ṭhik kukli kana. Menkhan onare bar bhul ukukan menakʼa.

① Bible do hoṛko do “bhage ar kại” mente bae haṭińkoa. Maptạu do “gateyak khon bhage” do baṅ bickom “Isor reakʼ pạuṛa pobitroge” kana. Uniyakʼ samaṅre, okoe hõ “theok bhage” baṅkana (Romiko lạgitʼ Pạul Apostolakʼ ciṭhi 3:23). Onate noa do “bhage hoṛ ar goekiạ” do baṅa bickom bar hoṛ mitʼ lekanakʼ maraṅ hasore — mitʼ doe rạphạ ńama, eṭakʼ doe baṅ ańjometʼa, “iń do uni khon jạsti ạrjạu menakʼtińạ” mentaeꞌ.

② Sorge ar norok reakʼ haṭiń do mitʼ katha rege menakʼa. Kạmi reakʼ nombor do baṅ, bickom Jisu Mạsire Probhu mente am ataṅakaea ar amakʼ kại samasiạ raṛakana se baṅ ona kana. Okoeyakʼ kại do Mạsi reakʼ maye iạte raṛakana uni do sorgeye senokʼa; okoe uni bae ataṅkedea, acʼakʼ kại lo tahẽena, uni do baṅ. Jãhãn bhage kạmi do amakʼ kại reakʼ samasiạ do bae raṛa daṛeakʼa.

Onate sorge ar norok do “bhage cạlạu reakʼ jo” do baṅ bickom Mạsi lo somondho reakʼ katha kana. Ar “pạtiạu” do mon reakʼ raji do baṅ bickom jiwi reakʼ Probhu badol kana — okoe sạrigeye ataṅkedea uni do bae rọṛ pukurea bickom jạsti jurutʼeye monạcurea.

Bible do bujhạu lekateye meneda: “Okoe uni Hoponreye pạtiạukʼ uniyakʼ do jãhãn bicạr baṅ hoyokʼtaea, menkhan okoe bae pạtiạukʼ uni do dusi kanae mente laharegeye lekha ocoakana” (Johan 3:18). Bicạr do “gujukʼ tayom amakʼ jiwi nombor emaꞌ” do baṅ bickom am Mạsi ataṅkedea se baṅ ona iạtege laharegeye thir akana.

Romiko lạgitʼ Pạul Apostolakʼ ciṭhi 3:23 · Johan 3:18 · Ephesiko lạgitʼ Pạul Apostolakʼ ciṭhi 2:8-9
s.faq.q2: ▸ Jisure baṅ pạtiạukate hõ bhage jiwiń jiyetʼ khan ona do baṅ da se?
s.faq.a2:
Noa do jạsti hoṛko disạyetʼkanako, menkhan sạri samasiạ oka kana ona bae bujhạukana. Mitʼ chobi emaꞌa.

Hudisme am do mitʼ hadiạ jạhạjre menakʼam. Tinạkʼ am ḍekʼ peṛecʼ ạphạ idiyetʼa, jạhạji hoṛko lo bhage tańgiyetʼa, bhage jiwi jiyetʼa, enrehõ am do mitʼ hadiạge tahẽna, ente jạhạj do amke acʼakʼ sec (bicạr reakʼ bondor sec) idimedạ. Samasiạ do “cạlạu reakʼ nombor” do baṅa bickom “am okoeyakʼ jạhạjrenam” (amakʼ porichoe) kana.

Onate susamacar do “jạsti bhage jiwi jio reakʼ koṛaomeꞌ” do baṅe meneda; ona do “jạhạjpe badol”e meneda. Kại reakʼ jạhạj khon adopʼkate Jisu sec ọsọrokʼmeꞌ — Isor reakʼ gidrạ reakʼ nãwa porichoe sec. Noa do koṛao iạte nombor uskạu do baṅa bickom acʼakʼ tihiń aṛaetʼ uni reye bharosạkate uniyakʼ jạhạj seceye parom reakʼ kana.

Sạrige Bible do bańcao reakʼ noa ucạṛkege uduketʼa — “Ente uni do ńut reakʼ rajosṭi khone bańcaoketʼbonte acʼren dulạṛiạ Hoponakʼ rajosṭiteye ucạṛ ạguketʼbona” (Kolossiko lạgitʼ Pạul Apostolakʼ ciṭhi 1:13).

Aloe bhulmeꞌ: noa do bhage jiwi jio reakʼ mane bạnukʼa mente baṅ kathaea. Bhalại do bańcao reakʼ “sorot” do baṅa bickom onakʼ jo kana. Okoe jạhạje badolketʼa uni do nitokʼ borte do baṅ bickom gidrạ reakʼ dulạṛtege bhageye jiyetʼa.

Kolossiko lạgitʼ Pạul Apostolakʼ ciṭhi 1:13 · Johan 1:12 · Ephesiko lạgitʼ Pạul Apostolakʼ ciṭhi 2:8-9
s.faq.q3: ▸ Tinre mitʼ dukdạ hoṛ “Isor do ińe khẹma akadińạ” mentaeꞌ ar suluktem tahẽna, menkhan dukoṛhạ tạnaꞌhõ dukokʼkana — enḍekhan ona khẹma do jạsti sostage baṅ daꞌ se?
s.faq.a3:
Noa kukli do ṭhik kana, ar ona haso do sạrige menakʼa. Menkhan onka katha do “Bible reakʼ khẹma” do baṅa bickom onakʼ bigṛaoakan rup kana.

① Isor reakʼ khẹma do tahẽn kahõ sosta do baṅa. Kại do “onka jãhãn baṅ hoyena” leka bae ḍakniakana; Isor acʼge acʼren Hopon reakʼ jiwiteye dại tolakeda. Kurus do kại sosta menteakʼ promạn do baṅa bickom kại tinạkʼ haram menteakʼ promạn kana — dhạrti reakʼ jạsti gãṭi khẹma.

② Sạri monạcur do joe joetʼa. Mitʼ dukdạ hoṛ dukoṛhạ samaṅre “Isor ińe khẹma akadińạ, onate sulukteń menakʼa” mente jolajre tahẽentaeꞌ khan, ona do monạcur do baṅa bickom onakʼ nokol kana (Mathae 3:8). Ar hoṛ ar Isor talare khẹma do dukoṛhạ reakʼ ghạu do bae mecʼakʼa ar dukoṛhạ doe khẹma lạgitʼ bae jọr ocoea.

③ Kại do tahẽn kahõ “onka rakapʼ” do baṅ hoyokʼa. Joto kại do bar ṭhạu khon mitʼ ṭhạureakʼ dại tolakʼa — se Mạsi do kurusre gakukoa (okoe ureye bharosạkʼa onko lạgitʼ ar dusi bạnukʼa, Romiko lạgitʼ Pạul Apostolakʼ ciṭhi 8:1), se okoe uni mucạtʼre baeꞌ ataṅkedea uni acʼge gakua. Onate “sosta khẹma” do bạnukʼa. Dukdạ hoṛ do noa dhạrti reakʼ niyom samaṅre hõ jobapeye emokʼa (Romiko lạgitʼ Pạul Apostolakʼ ciṭhi 13:1-4).

④ Dukoṛhạ reakʼ mẽtʼ dakʼ do Isor samaṅre tahẽn kahõ huḍiń do baṅa. Isor do rakʼkan hoṛko lo rakʼa, joto mẽtʼ dakʼe uyhạrkoa ar mucạtʼre acʼge jodtakoa (Johan sodor 21:4). Onate dukoṛhạ do hala ruạṛ reakʼ bhar do eskar bae gakua bickom dhormi Isor reye bharosạea (Romiko lạgitʼ Pạul Apostolakʼ ciṭhi 12:19 — “Hala ruạṛ reakʼ ektiạri do eken ińakʼge menakʼtińạ; ar ińgeń hala ruạṛa”).

Mathae 3:8 · Romiko lạgitʼ Pạul Apostolakʼ ciṭhi 8:1 · Johan sodor 21:4
s.respond.sub: Noa dulạṛ do khobor do baṅa bickom mitʼ kuli kana. Amakʼ ṭhạure toraoakan ona dulạṛ amakʼ monreye jũtʼakedea khan, nitokʼ noa binti do alga alga aṛangtege loyokʼmeꞌ.
s.respond.prayer:
E Isor,

iń do acʼakʼ teye bańcao bae daṛeakʼ mitʼ kại hoṛ kanaiń, ona doń manaoetʼa.

Ińiń bharosạea Jisu do iń lạgitʼe gujukʼlena ar aronaꞌe jiwitlena.

Iń reaṅ joto kại khẹmameꞌ, ar teheń khon iń jiwi reakʼ Probhu hoyomeꞌ.

Iń doam acʼren gidrạ leka ataṅińmeꞌ, ar nãwa jiwiń jio ocoińmeꞌ.

Jisu reakʼ ńutumteń binti kana. Amen.
s.respond.after: Am do noa monete binti akadam khan, Bible do meneda am do Isor reakʼ gidrạam hoyena. Am do ar eskar do baṅam — ọsọrre tahẽkan mitʼ mondoli ńamme ar pạtiạu reakʼ horre eṭakʼ lo mitʼdhạrte calakʼme.
s.respond.read: Bible amgetet paɽhaˀ — Johan khon ehoˀ
s.respond.verse: “Tinạkʼ do unireko pạtiạuen arko ataṅkede onko mimitʼko do Isorren gidrạ hoyokʼ reakʼ ạidạriye ematʼkoa.” — Johan 1:12 · Romiko lạgitʼ Pạul Apostolakʼ ciṭhi 10:9-10
s.closing.main:
Mitʼ Isor,
mitʼ kahni hotete,
tahẽn kahõ baṅ pạuṛa
dulạṛte abo seceye hijukʼkana.
s.closing.verse: “Moron se jion … se eṭakʼ jãhãn daṛeko, se serma cetanakʼko reakʼ se dhạrti latar reakʼ jãhãnakʼ sirjạuakʼge okoe hõ Isorakʼ dulạṛ khon do bako begar daṛeabona. Isorakʼ noa dulạṛ do aboren Probhu Mạsi Jisurege menakʼa.” — Romiko lạgitʼ Pạul Apostolakʼ ciṭhi 8:38-39
s.closing.small:
Noa kahni hor cetanre, Ạn, Kạbiạ pũthi, Nạbiko ar Ciṭhiko do “jilu” do hataoyetʼa.
Nitokʼ khon, am jãhãn pũthiam ḍaraoea, am do kahni reakʼ okare menakʼam ona udukʼam.
s.about.line: Korea reakʼ jạsti Protestant mondoli haṭiń (Susamacari · Sudhạrgạri) reakʼ bańcao-itihạsi ńel khon benaoakana.

epochs.title: Sirjon
epochs.one: Isor do mitʼ “tahẽn kahõ bhage” ot(jogot)e sirjạukeda.
epochs.events: Turuy mãhãte sirjon, manwa Isor reakʼ chobire benaoakan, Sạbat rạphạ
epochs.q: Etohopʼre Isor do ot ar sermaesirjạukeda.
epochs.christ: Jogot do “Bachan” hoteteye benaolena. Johan reakʼ Susamacar do meneda noa Bachan do Jisu acʼge kana (Johan 1:1-3).
epochs.detail:
Bible do daroson reakʼ jukti lo do baṅe ehopʼa bickom mitʼ kathate: “Etohopʼre Isor do…” Jogot do mitʼ haꞌ do baṅa bickom mitʼ porochạn Isor reakʼ kạmi kana.

  • Isor reakʼ chobi · joto sirjon talare, eken manwage Isor leka benao akana — uni baḍae ar jogot juton lạgitʼ.
  • Rạphạ · turuysiń rạphạ do joto jinis purạu ar suluk (shalom) re menakʼ udukʼa: “onage bhageena.”
  • Eden · bigṛao laharekʼ jogot, okare Isor ar hoṛ mitʼsạte calakʼkana.
epochs.next: Menkhan noa pạuṛao do esed jạuriaye rạphạrokʼa…

epochs.title: Gisạu
epochs.one: Kại do bolena, ar hoṛ ar Isor talare reakʼ somondhoe maḍana.
epochs.events: Mạnạ jo jom, Eden khon ucạṛ, moron ar joṅgi reakʼ hijukʼ
epochs.q: Iń do am ar maejiu talare … am do uniyakʼ iḍim sogagtaea.
epochs.christ: Susamacar reakʼ pạhilakʼ bachan, gisạu tayom takingege emoklena: “maejiuren bõsko” do biń reakʼ bohokʼe gejera — ar uni do Jisu kana (Genesis 3:15; Romiko lạgitʼ Pạul Apostolakʼ ciṭhi 16:20; Galathiko lạgitʼ Pạul Apostolakʼ ciṭhi 4:4).
epochs.detail:
“Isor leka hoyokʼ” reakʼ sạna iạte baeꞌ kạtni khon, kại do jogotreye bolena. Phol do eken niyom raputʼ do baṅa bickom somondho gisạu kana.

  • Gisạuakan somondho · Isor lo (ukuꞌ), gate lo (dusi em) ar dhạrti lo (jạnum ar joṅgi).
  • Moron · “am do tãhena gujukʼa” reakʼ cetạu do sạrieye hoyena.
  • Genesis 3:15 · enrehõ bicạr talarege bańcao reakʼ bachan do laharege emena. Sikhạukoe nuiyakʼ “protoevangelium (pạhilakʼ susamacar)”e metaea.
epochs.next: Nitokʼ Isor do bańcao ehopʼ lạgitʼ mitʼ hoṛe haka koea…

epochs.title: Purkhạko
epochs.one: Isor do Abraham binti emakea: “Am do bhorom reakʼ mitʼ nalaem hoyokʼa.”
epochs.events: Abraham lo niyom, Ishak reakʼ dại, Jakob reakʼ 12 ṭa hopon, Josep Misorre maraṅeye hoyena
epochs.q: Iń do am khon mitʼ maraṅ jạtiń benaokoa … ar am iạtege dhạrtiren sanam jạtrenko do bhorko ńama.
epochs.christ: “Sanam jạtrenko do bhorko ńama” reakʼ bachan do Abraham reakʼ bõs, Jisu rege purạukʼa (Galathiko lạgitʼ Pạul Apostolakʼ ciṭhi 3:16).
epochs.detail:
Isor do goṭa manwa reakʼ samasiạ do mitʼ hoṛ, Abrahame haka iạtege raṛ ehopʼeda. Onakʼ ṭhonok do niyom (bachan) kana — mitʼ maraṅ jạt, mitʼ disạm ar “sanam jạtrenko lạgitʼ bhorom.”

  • Pạtiạu · Abraham do baṅ ńel daṛeakʼ bachaneye pạtiạukeda, ar ona do uniyakʼ dhorom mente lekha ocolena (Genesis 15:6).
  • Ishak ar Jakob · bachan do tayom seyad sec calakʼa; Jakob (Israel) do 12 ṭa goṣṭi reakʼ baba kana.
  • Josep · acʼren bocojhi hoṛko aakirgea menkhan maraṅeye hoyena — “Isor do ona talate bhạlại reakʼe monsubạ akada” (Genesis 50:20).
epochs.next: Josep tayom oṛakʼren do Misorko adoꞌena… ar golamko hoyena.

epochs.title: Misor khon Oḍokʼ ar Ọtạr
epochs.one: Isor do golam hoṛkoe bańcaokoa ar acʼrenkoe benaokoa.
epochs.events: Gel ṭa marang dukh, Niskạr Porob, Aṛaꞌ Doreạ parom, Sinai re Gel ṭa Ạn, dạrạm oṛakʼ, ọtạrre 40 serma
epochs.q: Ona tayom ińren hoṛ menkate apeń ataṅpea ar aperen Probhu Isoriń hoyokʼa.
epochs.christ: Niskạr Porob — okare mereꞌ reakʼ maye do moron khon bańcaokeda — do Jisu sec udukʼa, “aboakʼ Niskạr mereꞌ,” abo lạgitʼ kurusre toraoyena (1 Korinthiko 5:7).
epochs.detail:
Purạn Niyom reakʼ jạsti maraṅ bańcao. Golam tahẽkan Israel do Isor reakʼ kạtni hotete chuṭ ńama ar acʼren hoṛ lekateko benaolena.

  • Niskạr Porob · oka oṛakʼ reakʼ duạrre mereꞌ reakʼ mayeye menakʼa ona do moron parome calakʼa — tayom reakʼ joto dại reakʼ chãch.
  • Aṛaꞌ Doreạ · hor cabaen ṭhạure bańcao; “parom calakʼ” do nãwa ehopʼ reakʼ cinhạ hoyena.
  • Sinai niyom · Gel ṭa Ạn hotete onko Isor reakʼ hoṛ lekate celeka jio do tẽhẽnako baḍaeada.
  • Dạrạm oṛakʼ · ucạṛiakan poro oṛakʼ okare Isor do hoṛko talareye tãhena — “Immanuel” reakʼ laharekʼ rọsạ.
  • 40 serma · baeꞌ kạtni iạte mitʼ janam do ọtạrreye gurena, menkhan Isor do manna ar daepoṛ ar singal reakʼ khũṭạ lo onko loe tãhena.
epochs.next: Bachan reakʼ disạm jạuri samaṅreko tẽhẽnkana, bol lạgitʼko sạjạukana…

epochs.title: Jit ar Bikʼcạrko
epochs.one: Disạmko ńama, menkhan raja bạnukʼ iạte joto hoṛ acʼakʼ sana lekako kạmiyetʼa.
epochs.people: Josua; Gideon ar Samson leka bikʼcạrko; Rut
epochs.events: Jeriko reakʼ urạꞌ, Kanan re bosti, kại–bicạr–bańcao reakʼ doharaꞌ cokkor
epochs.q: Unre hõ Israelko talare cele rajge bako tahẽkana. Ar okoe oka bhageye hudisetʼ tahẽkan onkageko kạmikan tahẽkana.
epochs.christ: Rut reakʼ bõs khon Dạude hijukʼa, ar Dạud reakʼ bõs khon Jisue hijukʼa (Mathae 1). Sạmaṅ-bãṅ talare hõ Mạsi reakʼ bõs do calaktegea.
epochs.detail:
Josua latare bachan reakʼ disạmreko bola, menkhan bostiyen tayom takinge Isorko hiṛiꞌa. Bikʼcạrko do ona gege chãch reakʼ doharaꞌ kana.

  • Latar sec cokkor · kại → coṭa → rakʼ → bikʼcạr bańcaoeda → aronaꞌ kại, ar jạsti haram hoyokʼkana.
  • Bikʼcạrko · Gideon, Samson, Debora — okte reakʼ bańcaokiạ, bir menkhan ḍher bhulko menakʼtaeko.
  • Rut · ńut okolre biswạsi reakʼ mitʼ marsal kahni; mitʼ bahrạ kuṛi do Dạud (ar Jisu) reakʼ bõsreye bola.
epochs.next: Hoṛkoe rakʼkana, “Aleḷe hõ mitʼ raja emaleꞌ!”…

epochs.title: Mitʼdom Rajosṭi
epochs.one: Isor do Dạud binti emakea: “Amakʼ siṅghạson do jaejug tahena.”
epochs.events: Pạhilakʼ raja Saul, Dạud ar Goliat, Dạud lo niyom, Solomon mondir benaokeda
epochs.q: Amakʼ bõs ar rajosṭi do am samaṅre jaejug ṭarhao akae tahena. Ar amakʼ siṅghạson do jaejug hạbicʼ tahena.
epochs.christ: “Jaejug siṅghạson” do Dạud reakʼ bõs, Jisu rege purạukʼa — onate uni do “Dạud reakʼ Hopon”e metaea (Luk 1:32-33; Mathae 1:1).
epochs.detail:
Israel reakʼ cetan okte, pe raja latare.

  • Saul · hoṛkoe ạsạkan pạhilakʼ raja; bhage ehopʼ menkhan baeꞌ kạtni iạte hatạuena.
  • Dạud · “Isor reakʼ mon leka mitʼ hoṛ.” Goliateye haraea ar Jerusaleme rajdhạni benaoea. Maraṅ kại (Bathseba)e kạmiketʼa menkhan monetege monạcureda (Sereńko 51).
  • Dạud lo niyom (2 Samuel 7) · Isor do Dạud reakʼ bõs jaejug ṭarhao reye bachaneda — Mạsiạ as reakʼ thir akan jạuri.
  • Solomon · hisạb ar bhorom reakʼ cetanre uni do Jerusalemre mondire benaoea, menkhan mucạtʼre murti pujạreye uyena.
epochs.next: Solomon tayom rajosṭi do bareye haṭińena…

epochs.title: Haṭiń Rajosṭi
epochs.one: Dạkʼsin (Jihudạ) ar uttor (Israel)re haṭińena, ar lahaꞌ lahaꞌeye bigṛaoena.
epochs.people: bar rajosṭi reakʼ rajako; Eliạ, Jesaea, Jirimiạ leka nạbiko
epochs.events: Rajosṭi haṭiń, murti pujạ, nạbiko reakʼ cetạu
epochs.q: Nonkate Israelko do Dạud bõsrenko cetanreko hulkeda; ar teheń hạbicʼ hõ onkage menakʼa.
epochs.christ: Noa oktere nạbiko do hijukʼ kana Mạsi reakʼ kathae bujhạu lekate jạsti udukʼkoa (Jesaea 9:6; Jesaea 53).
epochs.detail:
Solomon reakʼ hopon reakʼ oktere rajosṭi do haṭińena: uttor reakʼ Israel rajosṭi (10 goṣṭi, rajdhạni Samariạ) ar dạkʼsin reakʼ Jihudạ rajosṭi (2 goṣṭi, rajdhạni Jerusalem).

  • Israel (uttor) · joto raja do murtikoeko sebaketʼa; 722 P.K.re Assuriạ samaṅreye uṛukʼa.
  • Jihudạ (dạkʼsin) · Dạud reakʼ bõs do calaktegea, Hizkiạ ar Josiạ leka kotoꞌ bhage rajako menakʼkoa, menkhan goṭ lekate latar seceye senokʼa.
  • Nạbiko · Eliạ, Amos, Jesaea, Jirimiạ “ruạṛpe!”ko rakʼa. Mạsiạ bhabicʼbani do noageye cetanakʼa (Jesaea 53 reakʼ “duk sahaꞌ gohako”).
epochs.next: Mucạtʼre cetạu akan bicạrge hijukʼa — onkoko bandikate idiyetʼkoa…

epochs.title: Bandi Okol
epochs.one: Rajosṭi do uṛukʼa ar hoṛko do baṅ disạm seceko idiyetʼkoa.
epochs.events: Israel Assuriạ samaṅreye uṛukʼa (722); Jihudạ Babelreye uṛukʼa ar mondire ḍakniakʼa (586)
epochs.q: Babel reakʼ gaḍa aṛere duṛupʼkate tinre ale do Sion reakʼ kathale disạyetʼ tahẽkana unre ale dole rakʼetʼ tahẽkana.
epochs.christ: Jạsti maraṅ haso talare Jirimiạ do mitʼ “nãwa niyom” reye bachaneda (Jirimiạ 31:31) — ona gege niyom Jisu do mucạtʼ jom okte thire ocoeda.
epochs.detail:
Cetạuko do sạriena. Mondir do julena ar hoṛko Babel seceko idiyetʼkoa — disạm, raja ar mondir do hạtạwadkoa: joto khon latar oktegea.

  • Bar urạꞌ · Israel (Assuriạ, 722 P.K.) ar Jihudạ (Babel, 586 P.K.).
  • Daniel · murti puji raj durbạrre hõ pạtiạu reakʼ chãch (kul reakʼ khạtre); hijukʼ kana “jaejug rajosṭi” reakʼ daroson ńelkea.
  • As reakʼ mitʼ marsal · roho jaṅko aronaꞌ jiwitokʼ reakʼ daroson (Jeheskel 37) ar Jirimiạ reakʼ “nãwa niyom” do ńut talare tayom okte udukʼkana.
epochs.next: Iśi serma tayom, Isore hore lạgọṛeda — onko oṛakʼ seceko ruạṛkana…

epochs.title: Ruạṛ
epochs.one: Onkoko ruạṛkana ar mondir ar pạcil aronaꞌko benaokeda.
epochs.events: Kuros reakʼ hukum khon ruạṛ, mondir aronaꞌ benao, Jerusalem pạcil aronaꞌ thir, Bachan thir
epochs.q: Teheńakʼ din do aboren Probhu Isor ńutumte sonotakʼ din kana. Ar alope dukokʼa, ente Probhu Isore emakʼ rạskạge apeakʼ daṛe do.
epochs.christ: Malaki, Purạn Niyom reakʼ mucạtʼ pũthi, do Mạsi reakʼ hor sạjạu lạgitʼ mitʼ khobor hoṛ reakʼ bachan emkate mucạtʼeda: “Ńelpe, ińren goḍetiń kolekana” (Malaki 3:1).
epochs.detail:
Persiạ reakʼ raja Kuros reakʼ hukum (538 P.K.) khon ruạṛ do ehopʼa. Pe ḍap reko ruạṛkana ar urạꞌakanko aronaꞌko benaokeda.

  • Jerubabel · mondire aronaꞌ benaokeda (516 P.K.re purạuena).
  • Esra · Bachan aronaꞌe sikhạukoa ar pạtiạue jiwit ocoeda.
  • Nehemiạ · Jerusalem reakʼ pạcil 52 mãhãreye benaokeda.
  • Ester · Persiạren Jiuko goṭa bińạs khone bańcaokoa — “okte noa lạgitʼge cobokʼa kana?”
  • Tạnaꞌhõ tetạṅ · mondir do tẽhẽna, menkhan Dạud leka raja do bạnukʼa. Hoṛko do Mạsiako tẽtaṅkana.
epochs.next: Ar ona tayom… serma cupkidena leka, 400 serma parom calakʼa.

epochs.title: Cupkid Serma
epochs.one: 400 serma nạbi aṛang bạnukʼ — menkhan khelon do cupkidte sạjạuetʼ tahẽkana.
epochs.events: Persiạ → Grik → Makkabi suburạꞌ → Rom raj
epochs.q: Oktetetʼ purạuen khan Isor do acʼren Hopone kolkedea. Uni Hopon do maejiuakʼ kukhireye janamena.
epochs.christ: Noa goṭa “khelon sạjạu” do Isor reakʼ kạmi tahẽkana jemon Jisu do theok “okte purạu okte”e hijukʼa.
epochs.detail:
Malaki khon Nãwa Niyom hạbicʼ, lạkhạꞌ 400 serma nãwa Bible katha (nạbiko) bạnukʼ teye parom calakʼa. Menkhan itihạs tayom, Isor do susamacar pasnao reakʼ hore sạjạuetʼ tahẽkana.

  • Rajko badol · Persiạ → Grik (Aleksandar, 333 P.K.) → Ptolemi ar Selukidko → Makkabi suburạꞌ (167 P.K.) → Rom (63 P.K.).
  • Grik aṛang · Aleksandar reakʼ jit do Grik aṛange sadhạron aṛang benaoeda; Purạn Niyom do Grik aṛangreko ulthạukeda (Septuagint), susamacar lahaꞌ pasnaoakʼ lạgitʼ hore lạgọṛeda.
  • Rom reakʼ hor ar sạnti · bhage benaoakan hor ar “Pax Romana” do prạcạr lạgitʼ maraṅ horko hoyena.
  • Sabhạ oṛakʼ ar dolko · sabhạ oṛakʼ reakʼ sikhạu do thirena; Phorisi ar Sodukiko etohopʼena; ar Mạsiạ reakʼ tetạṅ do uṛakʼena.
epochs.next: Ar ona tayom cupkid do raputʼena — mucạtʼre, uniye hijukʼa.

epochs.title: Jisu Hijukʼa
epochs.one: Bachan akan Mạsi do hijukʼlena, gujukʼlena ar aronaꞌe jiwitlena.
epochs.events: Jiwi rup ạkhrid (Bodredạn), uniyakʼ sikhạu ar herel kạmi, kurusre moron, pesiñ hilokʼre jiwit
epochs.q: Ar ona kathatetʼge manwa jạt lekateye janamena ar aboko talareye girobasena … Uni do daya ar sạriyakʼteye perecʼgea.
epochs.christ: Maejiuren bõsko (dhạp 2), Abraham reakʼ bhorom (3), Niskạr mereꞌ (4), Dạud reakʼ jaejug raja (6), nãwa niyom (8) — joto do mitʼ hoṛ, Jisu regeko purạu akana: aboakʼ sạri nạbi, pujhạri ar raja.
epochs.detail:
Cupkid do raputʼena; Bachan akanae hijukʼa. Pũnyạ Susamacar do Jisu reakʼ jiwi, moron ar jiwit do pũnyạ pãhãta khon gohako emkoa.

  • Jiwi rup ạkhrid · Isor do manwae hoyena (Immanuel, “Isor abo lo”), Betlehem reakʼ huḍiń ṭhạure.
  • Kạmi · uni Isor reakʼ raje sikhạuyetʼa, hasua hoṛkoe sạrạkoa, kại hoṛkoe haka koa. “Okoe iń ńelkediń uni do Bapuyeye ńelkedea.”
  • Kurus · gisạu (dhạp 2) iạte hijukʼ akan kại ar moron reakʼ dại do abo reakʼ ṭhạure tol ańjomea. Sạri Niskạr mereꞌ.
  • Jiwit · pesiñ hilokʼreye jiwitokʼa ar kại, moron ar Soetan reakʼ kạtnie raputʼa — kurusrege uni do “sanam bạṛicʼ rajosṭiko ar ektiạriankoakʼ daṛeye cabaketʼtakoa … ar jotoko samaṅre onkoe bemanot ocoketʼkoa” (Kolossiko lạgitʼ Pạul Apostolakʼ ciṭhi 2:15).

Onate Jisu do abo reakʼ sạri nạbi (Isor sec hore udukʼa), sạri pujhạri (acʼge hoṛmote kại reakʼ dại tol ańjom) ar sạri raja (kại, moron ar Soetane haraea ar jaejuge rajaea) kana.
epochs.next: Jiwit akan Jisu do acʼren celạkoe jogot seceye kulkoa…

epochs.title: Mondoli reakʼ Ehopʼ
epochs.one: Atmạe hijukʼa, ar susamacar do dhạrti reakʼ mucạtʼ simạko hạbicʼe pasnaoa.
epochs.events: Pentekost re Atmạ hecʼa, mondoli janamena, sahaꞌ talate susamacar Jerusalem khon Rom hạbicʼe calakʼa
epochs.q: Sonot Jiu apereye hecʼlenre ape do daṛepe ńama … dhạrti reakʼ mucạtʼ simạko hạbicʼ ińren gohakope hoyokʼa.
epochs.christ: Noa kahni do teheń hạbicʼ calaktegea. Bible do bachan emkate mucạtʼeda je Jisu do aronaꞌe hijukʼa ar joto jinise nãwakoa (Johan sodor 21).
epochs.detail:
Jisu rakapʼ tayom, bachan akan Atmạ do Pentekostreye hijukʼa ar mondoli janamena. Susamacar do bisphoṭ lekateye pasnaoa.

  • Pentekost · Atmạ hotete borkan celạko do bahadur gohakoeko hoyena.
  • Petrus · Jerusalemre Jiuko sec susamacare prạcạreda.
  • Pạul · saste khon apostol; Anjati jogot bhar mondoliko thirkeda ar ciṭhikoe olkeda.
  • Mucạtʼ simạko hạbicʼ · Jerusalem → Jihudạ → Samariạ → Rom. Abraham emakʼ “sanam jạtrenko” reakʼ bachan do sạrieye hoyena.
  • Ar abo · kahni do bae mucạꞌa; Jisu reakʼ ruạṛ ar nãwa serma ar nãwa dhạrti seceye calakʼkana.
epochs.next: Menkhan kahni do noțere bae mucạꞌa…

epochs.title: Aronaꞌ Thir (joto nãwa)
epochs.one: Jisu aronaꞌe hijukʼa ar joto jinise nãwakoa.
epochs.events: Aronaꞌ hijukʼ, mucạtʼ bicạr, kại·moron·mẽtʼ dakʼ reakʼ mucạtʼ, nãwa serma ar nãwa dhạrti
epochs.q: Uni do onkoakʼ mẽtʼ dakʼe jodtakoa. Moron do ar baṅ hoyokʼa; duk, haso ar rakʼ joṅ do ar baṅ tahena.
epochs.christ: Pạhilakʼ sirjon reakʼ Eden do mucạtʼre “Nãwa Jerusalem” lekateye aronaꞌ thira. Isor do acʼren hoṛ lo jaejugeye tãhena — Immanuel reakʼ pạuṛa (Johan sodor 21:3; Mathae 1:23).
epochs.detail:
Bible do mondoli okte rege bae mucạꞌa. Onakʼ mucạtʼ pũthi, Johan sodor, do Jisu aronaꞌe hijukʼkana ar joto jinise purạukoa mente udukʼa.

  • Aronaꞌ hijukʼ · bachan akan raja do mọhịmạteye ruạṛa.
  • Mucạtʼ jit · Soetan ar moron do jaejug lạgitʼ haraꞌa, ar Mạsi do rajako reakʼ Raja lekateye rajaea (1 Korinthiko 15:25-26; Johan sodor 20:10).
  • Bicạr ar jiwit · joto baṅ thik jinis do thik ocoyena, ar gujukʼ akanko jiwitokʼa.
  • Nãwa serma ar nãwa dhạrti · kại, moron, mẽtʼ dakʼ ar duk do jaejug lạgitʼ adoꞌa (Johan sodor 21:4).
  • Aronaꞌ thir akan Eden · ehopʼ khon hõ bhage “Nãwa Jerusalem”re, Isor do acʼren hoṛ lo jaejugeye tãhena — goṭa Bible oka sec udukʼkana ona ṭhạu.

Onate nitokʼ do “ạcʼ akana, menkhan tạnaꞌhõ baṅ” reakʼ okte kana: Jisure bańcao do ạcʼ akana, menkhan onakʼ pạuṛa do tạnaꞌhõ tẽtaṅkana.
epochs.next: Enḍekhan noa goṭa kahni do “iń” lạgitʼ oka mane menakʼa?

love: Kahni reakʼ ehopʼ do bicạr do baṅa bickom dulạṛte ḍakao ocoyen sirjon kana.
Hoṛ kại kạmietʼ okterege, Isor do takingege bańcaneye bachaneda.
Isor do baeꞌ jọg hoṛe laharege ḍunḍhạea, ńutumteye haka koa ar bhorom reakʼ nalaeye benaoea.
Golam hoṛko reakʼ rakʼe ańjometʼa ar onkoe bańcao lạgitʼ acʼge latare ạdorena.
Banṛ pạuṛa thẽkạ akoa enrehõ, tin tinre rakʼkoa Isor do bańcaokiạe kulkoa ar onkoe rakapʼ ocokoa.
Uyuꞌ akan Dạud doe hõ baeꞌ aakira; uni hotete jaejug raja reye bachaneda.
Acʼ sec gãḍ udukʼ hoṛkoe nạbikoe kulkoa, binti lekate: “Dela ruạṛpe.”
Bandi okol reakʼ jạsti ńut disạm hạbicʼ hõ onko loe latarena ar aronaꞌ thir reye bachaneda.
Tin tinre thẽkạu akan hoṛko reaṅ hõ uniyakʼ bachan do bae ruạṛa bickom onkoe rakapʼ ocokoa.
400 serma cupkid talare hõ, ńel bãṅkate, bańcao reakʼ horeye sạjạuetʼ tahẽkana.
Abo kại hoṛ tahẽkanrege, uni do acʼren Hopone kolkedea ar acʼakʼ jiwiye emkeda.
Bon ńamakʼ ona dulạṛ do nitokʼ goṭa jogot sec lutuṛ lạgitʼe kuletʼa.
Mucạtʼre uni do joto mẽtʼ dakʼe jodakoa ar joto jinis dulạṛteye nãwakoa.

mis.w: “Cedakʼ Isor do kại kạmi daṛeakʼ hoṛe benaokoa? Tahẽn baṅ benao do bhage do baṅ tahẽkana se?”
mis.t: Isor do jogot ar hoṛ do jãhãn ghạti iạte do baṅe sirjạukoa, bickom ḍakao ocoyen dulạṛ iạtege. Manwa do Isor lo somondho daṛeakʼ hoṛko lekate benao do acʼge dulạṛ kana. Ar kại reakʼ bol do hõ Isor reakʼ bańcao reakʼ joṛnạ khon ọṛạ do baṅ tahẽkana (Ephesiko lạgitʼ Pạul Apostolakʼ ciṭhi 1:4-5). Bible reakʼ pạhilakʼ dhạp do bicạr do baṅa bickom dulạṛ kana.

mis.w: “Mitʼ jo jom iạtege ucạṛ ar moron hõ ńam — Isor do tahẽn kahõ bortạu do baṅa se?”
mis.t: Eden khon oḍoꞌ do bicạr ar mitʼsạtete daya tahẽkana. Isor khon oloṅkate, ona bigṛaoakan dosạre, hoṛ do jiwon dạreꞌ jo jomkate jaejug jiyetʼkan khan, jaejug lạgitʼ dukrege uṛukʼ ban tahẽkana (Genesis 3:22). Moron emoꞌ do ruạṛ hor jharaꞌ kana; ar ona ṭhạurege Isor do mitʼ Bańcaokiạe bachaneda (Genesis 3:15). Bicạr talarege dulạṛ menakʼ tahẽkana.

mis.w: “Abraham do uniyakʼ maraṅ pạtiạu iạteye ạsạuena — joto Bible hoṛko do bhage-jiwi bir do baṅkoa se?”
mis.t: Abraham do hõ husiṅgeye lana ar hutuṛuteꞌ, ar Jakob do ṭhogạ tahẽkana. Isor do “theok hoṛko” do baṅe haka koa bickom dayatege bhulan hoṛkoe haka koa. Ạsạu reakʼ kạtni do onkoakʼ ạrjạu do baṅa bickom Isor reakʼ biswạsi dulạṛ tahẽkana (Dosar Biboron 7:7-8).

mis.w: “Ạn (Hukumko) do bańcao ńam lạgitʼ utạr hoyokʼ jaruri mitʼ porikhạ se sorot do baṅ daꞌ se?”
mis.t: Isor do ạn emoꞌ laharege onkoe bańcaokoa. Gel ṭa Ạn do hõ bańcao reakʼ katha tete ehopʼa: “E Israelko, ińge amren Probhu Isor do. Misor disạm khon … ińgeń oḍok ạguakatʼmea” (Exodus 20:2). Ạn do “bańcao ńam lạgitʼ manaomeꞌ” do baṅa bickom dayatege bańcaoakan hoṛko celeka jio do tẽhẽnako lạgitʼ dulạṛ reakʼ hor udukʼ kana (Dosar Biboron 7:7-9). Tãhena daya laharege; manao do jobap kana.

mis.w: “Kanan reakʼ jit do daya bãṅ gọj tahẽkana — onate Purạn Niyom reakʼ Isor do sạrige bortạu kanae.”
mis.t: Noa do mitʼ aṛangre baṅ raṛaꞌ daṛeakʼ ar bujhi tãhena lạgitʼ katha kana. Menkhan Bible do noa do tahẽn pẽrạ tahẽn dạerạ marang hingsa lekate do baṅe uduketʼa bickom jạsti gãṭi kại (gidrạ dại lo) reakʼ tahẽn pẽrạ sahaꞌ tayom reakʼ bicạr lekate (Genesis 15:16; Dosar Biboron 9:4-5; Levitikus 18:24-25). Isor do bicạr lạgitʼ hõ baeꞌ ạurịja, ar uni sec ruạṛ hoṛ do rạskạtege ataṅkoa, bahrạ hoṛ tãhena rehõ, Rahab ar Rut leka (Josuạ 6:25; Rut 4:13-17).

mis.w: “Dạud do bãṅ bhul reakʼ bir tahẽkana — onate uni do ‘Isor reakʼ mon leka hoṛ’e metaena.”
mis.t: Dạud do besạni ar gạtạ hõe kạmiketʼa. “Isor reakʼ mon leka hoṛ” do pạuṛa mente do baṅa bickom acʼakʼ kại baeꞌ ukukeda — monetege monạcureda ar tãhena Isor seceye ruạṛa (Sereńko 51). Isor reakʼ dulạṛ do gãṭi sec uyuꞌ akan hoṛ doe hõ bae aakira.

mis.w: “Nạbi do tayom okte bachan emaꞌ mitʼ guni hoṛ kana / Purạn Niyom reakʼ Isor do eken khạpạa.”
mis.t: Nạbi reakʼ mon reakʼ ṭhonok do “tayom okte bachan emoꞌ” do baṅa bickom Isor reakʼ haso binti kana: “Dela ruạṛpe.” Bicạr reakʼ cetạu do hõ raṛ tatkạu lạgitʼ do baṅa bickom hoṛkoe ruạṛkoa ar jiwiyekoa lạgitʼ — “bạṛicʼ hoṛkoakʼ gujukʼte jãhãn rạskạ do bạń ńameda” (Jeheskel 33:11).

mis.w: “Bandi okol do udukʼa je Isor do Israele goṭatege bagiyada.”
mis.t: Bandi okol do bagi do baṅa bickom dulạṛiạ gidrạ sec mitʼ Baba reakʼ saji ar sạphạ thir kana (Ibriko 12:6). Isor do baeꞌ calaolena; Daniel lo bandi talarege tãhena ar bachaneda, “ińakʼ goṭawakʼ do ińiń baḍaea; ona do apeakʼ bhạlại lạgitʼge … ar ona goṭawakʼ hotetege apeakʼ tayom daram reakʼ as do purạukʼtapea” (Jirimiạ 29:11).

mis.w: “400 serma jãhãn aṛang bạnukʼ iạte, Isor do calaolena se rạphạyetʼ tahẽkanae.”
mis.t: Cupkid do tãhena bãṅkate do baṅa. Uni do eken baṅe rọṛlena, ona goṭa okte bańcao reakʼ khelon sạjạu lạgitʼ rajko, aṛangko ar horkoe oṭạuetʼ tahẽkana. Jạsti cupkid oktere, Isor do dulạṛtege jạsti kạmiyetʼ tahẽkana (Galathiko lạgitʼ Pạul Apostolakʼ ciṭhi 4:4).

mis.w: “Jisu do eken mitʼ bhage ạn sikhạukiạ kana / kurus do mitʼ duk reakʼ haraꞌ tahẽkana.”
mis.t: Jisu do acʼge Isor menteye lana (Johan 8:58), ar kurus do mitʼ haꞌ se haraꞌ do baṅa bickom monsubạ akan dulạṛ tahẽkana. Uni do jọrte baeꞌ idiakana bickom acʼge acʼakʼ jiwiye emkeda (Johan 10:18). “Jãhãege acʼren gateko lạgitʼ acʼakʼ jiwiye alaetae enḍekhan noa khon maraṅ dulạṛ do ar okoeyakʼ hõ bạnukʼa” (Johan 15:13).

mis.w: “Mondoli do pạuṛa hoṛko reakʼ mitʼ dhorom club kana, se eken mitʼ oṛakʼ kana.”
mis.t: Mondoli do “pạuṛa dhormiko” reakʼ sãgẽ do baṅa bickom khẹma ńam akan kại hoṛko reakʼ kana. Apostol Pạul do hõ acʼge “maraṅ kại hoṛ”e metaena (1Timothi 1:15). Etohopʼ reakʼ mondoli do hõ jhagṛaeada ar uyuꞌena (Aposkạmi 6:1; 1 Korinthiko 1:11). Noa do rọṛ pukur reakʼ ṭhạu do baṅa bickom ńam akan dulạṛko lutuṛ hoṛ kana (Johan 13:34-35).

core.title: Etohopʼ kại — okoe hõ dhormi baṅkoa
core.body: Samasiạ do “kotoꞌ bhul kạmi” do baṅa bickom mon reakʼ jạuri kana. Adam khon, joto hoṛ do kại latareko janamkana ar acʼakʼ teye Isor ṭhẽn bako seṭer daṛeakʼa.
core.vtext: dhorom do okoe hõ bạnukʼkoa, mitʼ hoṛ hõ baṅa… ente sanamkogeko kại akada ar Isorakʼ sarhao ńam lạgitʼko be lekgea.

core.title: Ạn iń bańcao bae daṛeakʼa
core.body: Ạn do mitʼ siḍi do baṅa bickom mitʼ arsi kana. Tinạkʼ koṛaoa, onạkʼ am tinạkʼ kombam ona udukʼa. Onakʼ ṭhonok do abo Mạsi seceye idibona.
core.vref: Romiko lạgitʼ Pạul Apostolakʼ ciṭhi 3:20 · Galathiko lạgitʼ Pạul Apostolakʼ ciṭhi 3:24
core.vtext: ạn hotetege manwa do acʼakʼ kại reaṅ cehaonae ńameda… Mạsi ṭhen seṭerokʼ lạgitʼ noa ạnge aboren ạyuricʼ do.

core.title: Daya hotete — mitʼ dan, koṛao do baṅ
core.body: Bańcao do jamao akan ạrjạu reakʼ dại do baṅa bickom baeꞌ jọg hoṛko lạgitʼ Isor reakʼ tãhena dan kana. Onate okoe hõ bae rọṛ pukur daṛeakʼa.
core.vtext: dayatepe bańcao akana biswạste… Noa do kạmiteakʼ jo lekate hõ baṅ emakana, jemon okoege aloko sarhaokʼ.

core.title: Pạtiạu hotete dhorom
core.body: Ạn manao iạte do baṅ bickom Jisu Mạsire pạtiạu iạte am do dhormim lekha ocoa — acʼakʼ dhorom do baṅ bickom uniyakʼ dhoromem tuhụ̃akʼa.
core.vref: Romiko lạgitʼ Pạul Apostolakʼ ciṭhi 5:1 · Galathiko lạgitʼ Pạul Apostolakʼ ciṭhi 2:16
core.vtext: Biswạs hotetege bon dhorom ocoakana… Isor do manwa ạn-ạrikoe manaoetʼ iạte dhorom mente bae aṅgocea, bickom Jisu Mạsire pạtiạukʼ hotetegeye aṅgocea.

core.title: Bible do Jisu sec udukʼa
core.body: Bible do maraṅ hoṛko reakʼ jiwoni se acʼ-gohạ pũthi do baṅa. Genesis khon Johan sodor hạbicʼ, joto sạkam do mitʼ hoṛ — Jisu Mạsi sece gawahi emkana.
core.vtext: ona sostor ma coṅ iń reaṅge gohae emetʼkan… sanam sonot sostorre acʼ reaṅ okako olakan ona jotoe bujhạuatʼkinạ.

core.title: Isor reakʼ raj — Jisu reakʼ ṭhonok katha
core.body: Jisu jạsti sikhạuketʼ bichạr. Isor reakʼ raja lekate raj do Jisu lo noa jogotre bolena ar uni ruạṛ okte purạukʼa. Kurus ar jiwit hotete, Jisu do kại, moron ar Soetane haraea ona sạri Raja kana.
core.vtext: Okte purạu akana, ar Isorakʼ raj do sorakana. Kại khon mon ạcurtape ar bhage sombatre pạtiạukʼpe.

core.title: Susamacar — uni do joto jinise purạukeda
core.body: Iń tol bãṅ daṛeakʼ kại reakʼ dại, Jisu do iń reaṅ ṭhạure kurusre tolkeda, ar jiwit hotete morone haraea. Iń do “noa kạmimeꞌ” cetanre do baṅ bickom “purạu akana” cetanreń duṛupʼa.
core.vref: Johan 19:30 · Romiko lạgitʼ Pạul Apostolakʼ ciṭhi 5:8
core.vtext: Purạu akana… kại hoṛ bon tahẽkanrege Mạsi do abo lạgitʼ jiwiye emkeda.
